ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_number" INTEGER /* Assignment number (e.g., 1, 2, etc.) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the assignment (e.g., M1, E1, etc.) */,
  "max_points" INTEGER /* Maximum points for the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assignment */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment type */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES assignment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment type (e.g., Quiz, Exam, Project) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assignment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment being submitted */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student submitting the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was submitted */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received for the submission */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the submitted file */,
  "late_submission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the submission was late */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's major */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission being graded */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received for the submission */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  "graded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor or TA who graded the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES assignment_submissions ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_graded_by FOREIGN KEY ("graded_by") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department chairperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_chairperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("chairperson_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
